mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.name as text, s.name as label, s.id as value, s.id_company FROM site as s WHERE id IN ( SELECT id_site FROM site_employee_map WHERE id_employee = ${employee_id} )
AND id_company IN
#{compId}
AND s.`name` LIKE CONCAT("%",#{keyword}, "%")

SELECT c.id, c.name as text, c.id as value, c.name as label FROM company c WHERE id in ( SELECT id_company FROM site WHERE id IN ( SELECT id_site FROM site_employee_map WHERE id_employee = #{employee_id} ) )
AND c.`name` LIKE CONCAT("%",#{keyword}, "%")
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO api_access ( id_user, created_date, updated_date, rate_limit ) VALUES( ${employee_id}, now(), now(), ${rate_limit} );
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as id
mapper.select:
SELECT id, id_user, security_key, status FROM api_access WHERE id_user = ${employee_id}
AND status = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO api_access_company_map (id_api_access, id_company, status) VALUES
( #{id}, #{item.id}, #{item.status} )

INSERT INTO api_access_site_map (id_api_access, id_site, status) VALUES
( #{id}, #{item.id}, #{item.status} )
mapper.select:
SELECT ac.id, ac.rate_limit, ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'id', s.id, 'text', s.name, 'label', s.name, 'value', s.id, 'company_id', t.id_company, 'status', t.status ) ) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT acs.id_site, acs.status, s.id_company FROM api_access_site_map acs INNER JOIN site s on s.id = acs.id_site WHERE acs.id_api_access = ac.id AND s.is_delete = 0 AND s.`status` = 1 ) t JOIN site s ON s.id = t.id_site ) AS sites, ( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'id', c.id, 'text', c.name, 'label', c.name, 'value', c.id, 'status', t.status ) ) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT acm.id_company, acm.status FROM api_access_company_map acm WHERE acm.id_api_access = ac.id ) t JOIN company c ON c.id = t.id_company ) AS companies
FROM api_access ac WHERE ac.id_user = #{employee_id};

WITH RECURSIVE hours AS ( SELECT 0 AS `hour` UNION ALL SELECT `hour` + 1 FROM hours WHERE `hour` < 23 ), data AS ( SELECT HOUR(time) AS `hour`, COUNT(*) AS total FROM api_usage WHERE id_user = #{employee_id} AND DATE(time) = DATE(NOW()) GROUP BY HOUR(time) ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(h.`hour`, '%H'), '%h:00 %p') AS label, IFNULL(d.total, 0) AS value FROM hours h LEFT JOIN data d ON d.`hour` = h.`hour` ORDER BY h.`hour`;

WITH RECURSIVE days AS ( SELECT 1 AS `day` UNION ALL SELECT `day` + 1 FROM days WHERE `day` < DAY(LAST_DAY(NOW())) ), data AS ( SELECT DAY(time) AS `day`, COUNT(*) AS total FROM api_usage WHERE id_user = #{employee_id} AND DATE_FORMAT(time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY DAY(time) ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(YEAR(NOW()), '-', MONTH(NOW()), '-', d.`day`), '%m-%d-%Y') AS label, IFNULL(t.total, 0) AS value FROM days d LEFT JOIN data t ON t.`day` = d.`day` ORDER BY d.`day`;

WITH quarters AS ( SELECT 1 AS q UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 ), data AS ( SELECT QUARTER(time) AS q, COUNT(*) AS total FROM api_usage WHERE id_user = #{employee_id} AND YEAR(time) = YEAR(NOW()) GROUP BY QUARTER(time) ) SELECT CONCAT('Q', q.q, '-', YEAR(NOW())) AS label, IFNULL(d.total, 0) AS value FROM quarters q LEFT JOIN data d ON d.q = q.q ORDER BY q.q;

WITH RECURSIVE months AS ( SELECT 1 AS `month` UNION ALL SELECT `month` + 1 FROM months WHERE `month` < 12 ), data AS ( SELECTa MONTH(time) AS `month`, COUNT(*) AS total FROM api_usage WHERE id_user = #{employee_id} AND YEAR(time) = YEAR(NOW()) GROUP BY MONTH(time) ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CONCAT(YEAR(NOW()), '-', m.`month`, '-01'), '%b-%Y') AS label, IFNULL(d.total, 0) AS value FROM months m LEFT JOIN data d ON d.`month` = m.`month` ORDER BY m.`month`;
SELECT security_key, security_key_name FROM api_access WHERE id_user = #{employee_id}
